Clean rebuild

Tabs, quote preview, invoice preview and schedules are rebuilt cleanly in this version.

🔗 Timesheet App Integration

The timesheet app should read from the shared Active Jobs Feed.

Each timesheet entry should store:

  • Job Number
  • Customer
  • Site
  • Job Description
  • Hours Worked

Engineers should select jobs by description/site rather than typing job numbers manually.

WGE New Quote / Job Process

  1. Create/select customer & site in Customers & Sites first. This pulls invoice address, site address and contact into the quote.
  2. Start the quote using “Use Selected Site on Quote”. Press Next Quote Ref to allocate the next WB/DG quote number.
  3. Run the correct calculator: Standard Quote Calculator, ASHCO Costing or Kensal Costing.
  4. Send total to quote, then check the wording and PDF layout.
  5. Save/export the PDF and calculation into the Dropbox job folder manually for now.
Dropbox recommendation: the browser cannot silently save files directly into your local Dropbox folder for security reasons. Best working approach now is to store the Dropbox folder/link on the job record, generate PDFs/calcs, then save/drag them into that folder. Later we can connect Dropbox API for true automatic saving.

Add customers once, then add as many sites and contacts as needed. Selecting a customer filters the site dropdown. Selecting a site pulls through the site address and contacts for the quote.

Customer Database

ASHCO Cost Breakdown

This costing page is specifically for ASHCO-style jobs where they need a clear breakdown of labour, materials, lodge and total price. Enter the description, quantity/amount, labour hours and costs line by line, then send the final total into the quote price.

ASHCO Settings

Cost Lines

Description Amount / Qty Labour Hours Per Item Labour Rate Labour Total Material Cost Per Item Sundry Per Item Lodge Total Materials Sell Line Total

ASHCO Breakdown Summary

Total Labour£0.00
Total Materials Cost£0.00
Total Materials Sell£0.00
Total Lodge£0.00
Uplift£0.00
Total Price£0.00

The Total Price pushes into the quote Net Price box. This page saves locally in this browser for now.

How to Draft a New Quote

  1. Add/select customer: Go to Customers & Sites, select the customer and site. Site address/contact will pull through.
  2. Create the quote: Press “Use Selected Site on Quote”. Fill in Project / Re and rough scope notes.
  3. Calculate price: Use Quote Calculator, ASHCO Costing or Kensal Costing depending on the job.
  4. Send total to quote: Press “Send Total to Quote Price”.
  5. Finish wording: Use AI Commercial Rewrite, then check/edit the quote wording manually.
  6. Save/send: Generate PDF and email. The quote is saved in the Quote Register for amendments/revisions.

Quote Calculator

Build up the labour, travel and material cost here, then push the total directly into the quote price.

Hourly Rates

Rate A applies to Monday–Friday first 8 hours. Over 8 hours is charged at Rate B. Travel is charged at Rate A.

This updates the Net Price box on the Quote Generator. VAT is then calculated by the quote template.

Kensal Conveyor Costing Sheet

This has been matched to the uploaded Kensal Excel sheet. Enter the yellow-style inputs: Motors, Sensor, E Stop/P Button, Interface, Panel, Basket, cable lengths/costs and additional materials. Grey-style values calculate automatically.

Quote Storage / Register

Save quotes into the register, export a Quote Pack for Dropbox, create revisions, mark accepted/lost and convert accepted quotes into live jobs.

No quote saved yet.

Create Quote Workflow

Recommended process: create the quote first, choose customer/site/contact and prepared by, select quote type, complete the costing, send total to quote, then save/email/PDF. When the customer sends an order number, convert the quote into a live job.

1. Quote owner
Wayne = WB numbers. David = DG numbers/signature.
2. Customer/site
Pulls invoice address, site address and contact email.
3. Quote type
Standard, ASHCO or Kensal opens the right costing sheet.
4. Convert later
Accepted quote can become a live job with order number.
Ready

Quote Save Location

For now this records the folder location and helps you save PDFs/calculations manually. Full automatic Dropbox saving needs Dropbox API approval/integration.

Quote Register / Saved Quotes

Quotes now auto-save as drafts in this browser. Use this section to load, revise, mark sent/accepted/rejected, or search previous quotes.

Auto-save ready.

Quote Generator

Type or dictate rough wording, press AI rewrite, then edit the polished scope if needed. The preview updates live.

Dictate or type rough engineer notes in your own words, then press AI Commercial Rewrite. It will turn the wording into professional quotation language.

The AI Commercial Rewrite now preserves engineering details such as containment, distribution boards, conduit drops, locations and workshop areas, whilst converting rough engineer wording into professional commercial quotation language.
If dictation does not start, Chrome/Safari may be blocking microphone access from a downloaded file. On iPhone/iPad you can tap inside Rough Scope Notes and use the keyboard microphone.
Polished Scope of Works

Editable after rewriting.

You can edit the polished wording in the left-hand box, or edit directly inside the quote preview on the right. Changes stay linked.
